---
title: "GhostTraceLayer.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\GhostTraceLayer.tsx"
loc: 40
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.47
style_score: 4.06
intel_score: 3.00
overall_score: 4.14
---

## Intent
The `GhostTraceLayer.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on TraceLine, lineRef, GhostTraceLayer, GhostTraceLayer. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TraceLine, lineRef, GhostTraceLayer, GhostTraceLayer. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Line](file://@react-three/drei)
- [GhostTrace](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TraceLine`
- `lineRef`
- `GhostTraceLayer`
- `GhostTraceLayer`
